overall.description: A slow cinematic drone flight through a rain-soaked cyberpunk urban canyon at night. The scene features dense industrial architecture with vibrant red and cyan neon signage, overhead walkways, and atmospheric steam effects, rendered in high-quality game engine graphics.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk industrial alley entrance with overhead bridge

agents.ego_description: slowly drifting forward through the rain-soaked canyon, observing the vibrant neon-lit architecture on both sides

entered.detail: metal walkway connecting the two sides of the alley, spanning across the gap above
tall structure with prominent red glowing lights and industrial piping
bright cyan neon signs and holographic displays on the left building facade
massive tower visible in the distance through the alley canyon
thick cables stretching between buildings across the alleyway
weathered industrial metal panels and structures on the left side

segments.scene_description: The video opens on a rain-soaked cyberpunk alley at night, with the camera drifting slowly forward. An overhead pedestrian bridge spans the canyon ahead, while red neon lights illuminate the right-side industrial building and cyan holographic signs glow on the left. The tall central skyscraper looms in the distant fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: mid-alley section under overhead walkway with steam vents

events.description: passing directly underneath the overhead pedestrian bridge, temporarily darkening the view
steam vents release thick white vapor into the alleyway, increasing atmospheric haze

agents.ego_description: continuing the forward drift as the alley narrows, passing under the bridge structure

entered.detail: vents releasing white steam into the air, creating atmospheric depth
green glowing signs appearing on the right building facade
metal balconies and walkways attached to the left building

segments.scene_description: The camera moves deeper into the canyon, passing underneath the overhead pedestrian bridge around the 15-second mark. Steam vents activate, releasing vapor into the rain. The cyan signage from the entrance fades from view as green neon lights become visible on the right, and the industrial details of the left building become more prominent.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep urban canyon approaching central tower

events.description: deeper shadows envelop the scene as the canyon narrows toward the tower base

agents.ego_description: approaching the end of the visible alley with the central tower looming larger ahead

entered.detail: detailed metal walkways and platforms on the left side at close range
small red and green lights visible deep in the alley mist

segments.scene_description: In the final section, the camera moves past the overhead bridge and deeper into the narrowing canyon. The central skyscraper grows larger in the frame as the camera approaches. Metal grating platforms are now visible at close range on the left, while the red neon building fades behind. The alley continues into misty darkness ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked cyberpunk alley that gradually narrows as it descends deeper into a misty urban canyon. It begins by drifting forward past red neon industrial buildings and cyan holographic signs, with a distant skyscraper looming through the fog beneath an overhead pedestrian bridge. As the camera passes under the bridge, the cyan glow fades and is replaced by emerging green neon lights while steam vents release plumes of vapor into the falling rain. The scene then shifts toward the narrowing corridor, where the red lighting recedes and detailed metal grating platforms appear on the left. Finally, the central skyscraper grows dominant in the frame as the camera pushes further into the oppressive, misty darkness of the city.
